scripts.deploy:prod: bunx dotenv-cli -v STAGE=prod -e ../../.env.production -- bun ../../packages/alchemy-utils/src/alchemy-cli.ts deploy ping
scripts.deploy:staging: bunx dotenv-cli -v STAGE=staging -e ../../.env.staging -- bun ../../packages/alchemy-utils/src/alchemy-cli.ts deploy ping
scripts.destroy:prod: bunx dotenv-cli -v STAGE=prod -e ../../.env.production -- bun ../../packages/alchemy-utils/src/alchemy-cli.ts destroy ping
scripts.destroy:staging: bunx dotenv-cli -v STAGE=staging -e ../../.env.staging -- bun ../../packages/alchemy-utils/src/alchemy-cli.ts destroy ping
scripts.dev: bunx dotenv-cli -v STAGE=local -e ../../.env.local -- bun ../../packages/alchemy-utils/src/alchemy-cli.ts dev ping
